_comment: Per-hardware-class baselines for `meeting-scribe validate --full`. Override any threshold via env vars (e.g. SCRIBE_VALIDATE_ASR_P95_MS=500). Captured 2026-04-28 on the GB10 dev box; refresh after any model bump.

tts._baseline_note: Measured 2026-04-28 first-call ~1933ms; warm calls ≪ that. Threshold leaves headroom for cold start + light contention.
